description: As the Revenue Manager at the Grandview Hotel & Conference Center, prepare a Q3 2024 performance report for the upcoming quarterly ownership meeting using ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/daily_room_revenue.csv and ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/room_inventory.csv. Create a comprehensive hotel revenue performance workbook at ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/hotel_revenue_analysis.xlsx using formulas. The workbook must include monthly KPIs for July, August, and September (Occupancy %, ADR, and RevPAR), a channel/rate code mix analysis, day-of-week demand patterns (weekday vs. weekend), a performance breakdown by room type, and an executive summary sheet with Q3 aggregate metrics.
